name: vaipakam-cloud-backup
description: Internal-ops Cloudflare Worker that nightly exports vaipakam-archive D1 (offers + loans + diag_errors + legal_holds + lz_alerts) + the vaipakam-legal-vault R2 bucket to Backblaze B2 on a separate billing/credential boundary, client-side encrypted with AES-256-GCM using a key NOT stored in CF (operator-offline). Stage A of the off-chain data resilience plan (issue #30 / T-077); see docs/DesignsAndPlans/OffChainDataResilience.md.
